mapper.select: SELECT ph.id, ph.user_id, ph.track_id, ph.progress_sec, ph.last_play_time, ph.play_count, ph.is_completed, t.id as track_id, t.series_id as track_series_id, t.category_id as track_category_id, t.title as track_title, t.cover as track_cover, t.audio as track_audio, t.duration_sec as track_duration_sec, t.intro as track_intro, t.order_index as track_order_index, t.status as track_status, t.remark as track_remark FROM mg_play_history ph LEFT JOIN mg_track t ON ph.track_id = t.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT ph.id, ph.user_id, ph.track_id, ph.progress_sec, ph.last_play_time, ph.play_count, ph.is_completed, t.id as track_id, t.series_id as track_series_id, t.category_id as track_category_id, t.title as track_title, t.cover as track_cover, t.audio as track_audio, t.duration_sec as track_duration_sec, t.intro as track_intro, t.order_index as track_order_index, t.status as track_status, t.remark as track_remark FROM mg_play_history ph LEFT JOIN mg_track t ON ph.track_id = t.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT ph.id, ph.user_id, ph.track_id, ph.progress_sec, ph.last_play_time, ph.play_count, ph.is_completed, t.id as track_id, t.series_id as track_series_id, t.category_id as track_category_id, t.title as track_title, t.cover as track_cover, t.audio as track_audio, t.duration_sec as track_duration_sec, t.intro as track_intro, t.order_index as track_order_index, t.status as track_status, t.remark as track_remark FROM mg_play_history ph LEFT JOIN mg_track t ON ph.track_id = t.id WHERE ph.id = #{id}
